nasb.text: For in the days of David and Asaph, in ancient times, there were leaders of the singers, songs of praise and hymns of thanksgiving to God.

esv.text: For long ago in the days of David and Asaph there were directors of the singers, and there were songs of praise and thanksgiving to God.

cnv.text: 因為遠在大衛和亞薩的時代，已有詩班長，並且有讚美稱頌　神的詩歌。

ccb.text: 远在大卫和亚萨的时代就有歌乐手，并有赞美、称颂上帝的诗歌。
